title: thelypteris decussata var. costaricensis
intro: Thelypteris decussata var. costaricensis, also known as the Costa Rican shield fern, is a type of plant belonging to the family Thelypteridaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Thelypteris decussata var. costaricensis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves are also used in traditional herbal remedies, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
